title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Vacation Booking
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book my vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Leave accrues monthly, with 1.67 days earned for each month worked. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance to ensure proper scheduling. Your manager will review the request and confirm approval within five business days. If you need to cancel or modify your request, please notify your manager as soon as possible. For any questions regarding your leave balance or the booking process, contact the HR department at hr@company.com or call extension 1234.
